questions.question: Compare the time complexities of comparison counting sort and heap sort. Which one has an advantage in terms of time complexity for large datasets? Explain your reasoning.
Write a step-by-step description of how comparison counting sort works, highlighting the key steps involved in the sorting process.
What is the space complexity of comparison counting sort? How does it compare to other comparison-based sorting algorithms like quicksort or mergesort? Explain your answer.
